name: TIC Solutions, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a leading provider of tech-enabled Testing, Inspection, Certification and Compliance (TICC), engineering, and geospatial services. We provide mission-critical services that are essential to the safety, reliability, and efficiency of industrial assets, buildings, and public infrastructure.
